profile.name: Manbir Singh
profile.headline: I engineer high-performance web applications and scalable technical architecture.
profile.subline: I specialize in React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. I transform complex business requirements into clean and performant code.

projects.title: Full-Stack Platform Prototype
projects.description: I built a comprehensive platform prototype using React and TypeScript. I designed the complete customer journey and implemented a reusable component library for the engineering team. I used this prototype for investor demonstrations to establish the production roadmap.

projects.title: Process Redesign and CRM Architecture
projects.description: I redesigned the fee proposal process to improve visibility and ownership. I built stage-gating validation tools and management dashboards within HubSpot. I produced comprehensive documentation to ensure the system remains scalable for the team.

projects.title: Brand Identity and Website
projects.description: I built a professional brand identity system and website. I established a design language that extends across all digital and physical materials. I ensured the client is self-sufficient for ongoing content management.
